PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 4432\); "postgres port 4432: OPEN" } catch { "postgres port 4432: CLOSED — $_" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) })

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('j:/SVN/SVN_26/prods-tmp.json','utf8'\)\); const wd=d.data.filter\(p=>p.packs.some\(pk=>pk.mrp&&pk.mrp>pk.price\)\); const wl=d.data.filter\(p=>p.packs.some\(pk=>pk.packLabel&&!['1 unit','default','pcs','1'].includes\(pk.packLabel.toLowerCase\(\)\)\)\); const ins=d.data.filter\(p=>p.packs.some\(pk=>pk.inStock\)\); console.log\('total',d.total,'discount',wd.length,'pack label',wl.length,'in stock',ins.length\); if\(wd[0]\){const pk=wd[0].packs[0];console.log\('discount:',wd[0].name,'sp',pk.price,'mrp',pk.mrp,'save',pk.mrp-pk.price\);} if\(wl[0]\)console.log\('pack:',wl[0].code,wl[0].packs[0].packLabel\);")
